label: Recent Fills
description: Latest order fills with instrument, side, quantity, price, and fill status. Updates in real time.

0.4.note: Fixed: removed redundant 'as unknown' intermediate cast; replaced with direct Array.isArray guard on ordersData.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: 'No recent fills' message was already present.

1.3.note: Orders endpoint not org-scoped; shows fills for authenticated user. Documented as known limitation.

1.4.note: Orders endpoint not client-scoped. Documented as known limitation.

1.5.note: Orders not strategy-filtered at context level. Documented as known limitation.

1.6.note: No scope filtering applied — full orders dataset returned.

1.7.note: No fixture constants embedded in widget.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.3/1.4/1.5 N/A: orders API does not accept scope params at this API layer.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (shows recent fills from live trading), batch ✓ (shows historical fills for asOfDatetime period), paper ✓ (display-only, reads from context).

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(); orders fetched via useOrders() hook in context producer.

3.3.note: Human check: no order submission in this widget; display-only fills list.

3.4.note: Human check: no explicit mode indicator; relies on scope-summary.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget is display-only; renders orders regardless of mode. Paper fills would populate from paper trading engine.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in RecentFillsWidget section.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: 'View All' Button wrapped in Link to /services/trading/orders. No dead buttons.

4.3.note: Human check: no form fields; display-only fills list.

4.4.note: Human check: fills list updates when scope changes (to extent orders are scope-filtered).

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.8.note: Human check: overflow-auto on root div.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all order-generating strategies. Relevant to any DeFi, CeFi, TradFi strategy that produces execution fills (basis-trade, staked-basis, market-making, directional, etc.).

l6.notes: Not started — L6 (tests) deferred to subsequent pass.

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches in RecentFillsWidget section. text-emerald-400, text-rose-400, text-amber-400 are Tailwind classes, not raw hex.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.3.note: RecentFillsWidget is ~50 lines within bottom-widgets.tsx (188 total). Well under limits.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in RecentFillsWidget. All data from context refs.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: RecentFillsWidget text-[9px] at line 138 replaced with text-nano (token --text-nano 0.5625rem already exists in globals.css). Zero arbitrary text-[Npx] classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Spinner, Link from shared primitives.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt. Fill rows are plain divs (display-only, not interactive). No role needed. Human: keyboard-only walkthrough pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: recent-fills is a compact preview; full execution history belongs on the orders page.

relationships.notes: Shows top 5 fills from ordersData. Links to /services/trading/orders. Not scoped by org/client/strategy (orders API limitation).

dataContract.mockSource: unknown — ordersData is typed as unknown in OverviewData; populated via useOrders() hook in use-overview-page-data.ts
dataContract.notes: ordersData parsed defensively (Array.isArray guard + nested .orders fallback). Scope filtering not applied at orders API layer.

gaps: Orders not filtered by org/client/strategy scope
No real-time streaming of new fills (polling only)
coverage.notes: Shows any order type that produces a FILLED status. Coverage limited to REST polling cadence.

knownIssues: Orders data is not filtered by org/client/strategy scope — the useOrders() hook does not accept scope parameters. Widget shows all fills for the authenticated user regardless of scope selection. Future work: wire scope into useOrders() or filter ordersData in context.

findings.description: recent-fills — had redundant 'as unknown' intermediate cast for ordersData
findings.fix: Replaced with direct Array.isArray guard on ordersData typed as unknown from context

findings.description: RecentFillsWidget — ~3 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bottom-widgets.tsx:138 — text-[9px] on Badge BUY/SELL chip in RecentFillsWidget
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (token --text-nano 0.5625rem already exists in globals.css; no new token request needed).
